title: ReNDI
description: Ability to Customize the Vanilla Damage Immunity System.
body:
NoDamI mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!  

# About the Mod  

ReNDI removes or alters the redundant damage immunity system. This makes combat smoother and more challenging by eliminating the default invincibility frames (i-frames) after taking damage.  

# Key Features  
Remove Default I-Frames: Most damage events no longer provide i-frames, with exceptions for certain damage sources (e.g., lava) and mobs (e.g., slimes).  
Prevent Glass Cannon Playstyles: Attacks charged 10% or less are canceled.  
Knockback Settings: Attacks charged 75% or less do not cause knockback.  
Customizable Config: Users can adjust i-frame settings and attack charge requirements through a config file.  

# Original Mod Link  
[NoDaml](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nodami) by ProfHug0
